code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)

  mut evens: List<Int> = []
  mut odds: List<Int> = []

  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok_opt = tokens.get(i)
    match tok_opt
    when Some(tok)
      let num_opt = string.parse_int(tok)
      match num_opt
      when Some(n)
        if n % 2 == 0
          evens = list.push(evens, n)
        else
          odds = list.push(odds, n)
        end
      when None
        # skip non-integer tokens
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut evens_str = ""
  mut ei = 0
  while ei < evens.len()
    let v_opt = evens.get(ei)
    match v_opt
    when Some(v)
      if ei == 0
        evens_str = "#{v}"
      else
        evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    ei = ei + 1
  end

  mut odds_str = ""
  mut oi = 0
  while oi < odds.len()
    let v_opt = odds.get(oi)
    match v_opt
    when Some(v)
      if oi == 0
        odds_str = "#{v}"
      else
        odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    oi = oi + 1
  end

  print("evens=#{evens_str}")
  print("odds=#{odds_str}")
  Ok(())
end
